_comment: Nether Beast (冥兽) — Renegade Immortal. Canon confidence: 5/5. Prime Directive: this beast exists objectively whether the player has the perception to recognize it.
name: Nether Beast

canonical.appearance: Shadow-wreathed quadruped, body perpetually trailing black mist, eyes are pinpoints of cold green fire.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: Nether core refines Soul Refining materials; used in dark-attribute restriction creation
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: Nether Beasts inhabit the Sea of Devils; their cores are used by Soul Refining Sect
